about.text: My name is Jelle Schrijver and I am a student in the Associate Degree Programming at Hogeschool PXL. This online portfolio was created as part of the Workplace Learning 1 course and serves as a reflection of my learning process throughout this trajectory. In this portfolio, I document my experiences, assignments, and projects that I have carried out both at school and in the workplace. The focus here is on developing my technical skills, my problem-solving thinking, and my professional attitude. Additionally, this portfolio contains reflections on my growth as a beginning programmer and the feedback I received from my lecturers. Each section is structured to provide a clear and organized overview of my progress. The portfolio is intended as a tool for evaluation, guidance, and self-reflection. In this way, it forms not only an overview of my achieved results but also of the learning objectives I have actively worked on.

opleiding.title: Education choice
opleiding.why_programming_p1: My interest in programming arose at a young age, during the talent labs in the first year of secondary school. There, I first came into contact with logical thinking and problem-solving through small programming assignments. Solving these assignments immediately gave me a lot of satisfaction.
opleiding.why_programming_p2: In the subsequent years, this interest was further deepened within STEM sciences. Projects with Minecraft Education, robotics, and automation reinforced my enthusiasm for combining creativity and technology.
opleiding.why_programming_p3: What appeals to me most about programming is solving problems and building creative solutions. For me, programming is both a passion and a future-oriented career choice.
opleiding.why_job_title: Why does this profession suit me?
opleiding.why_job_p1: The profession of programmer aligns well with my way of working. I enjoy working independently, experimenting with solutions, and learning from mistakes.
opleiding.why_job_p2: When a problem becomes complex, I consciously take a step back to continue working with a fresh perspective. This helps me to persevere, even with challenging assignments.
opleiding.why_job_p3: Additionally, I possess qualities such as problem-solving thinking, creativity, and perseverance, which are essential within this profession.
